0.q: expression of SeNHX1 significantly enhanced Na+ tolerance equivalent to endogenous NHX1... the NaCl tolerance conferred by SeNHX1 protein correlated with greater Na+ content, indicative of ion compartmentalization rather than extrusion.

2.q: Knockdown of SeVHA-A resulted in a reduction in both V-ATPase and vacuolar H+-PPase (V-PPase) activities. Accordingly, the SeVHA-A-RNAi cells showed increased vacuolar pH and decreased cell viability under different NaCl concentrations.

8.q: Overexpression of SePSY enhanced significantly the photosynthesis rate and PSII activity (Fv/Fm) as compared with WT (Table 1).

9.q: The lines overexpressing SePSY accumulated less H2O2 than WT plants under salt stress, suggested that overexpression of SePSY induced the activity of SOD, and POD in the transgenics.

12.q: H+-translocating inorganic pyrophosphatase (H+-PPase) catalyses a coupled reaction of inorganic pyrophosphate (PPi) hydrolysis and active proton transport across membranes.
